stemHtml: If by mistake a pilot incorrectly calculates the critical take-off speeds (V1, VR, V2), what potential issue could occur during take-off?

options.a: The aircraft will experience a lower stall speed
options.b: The aircraft may overrun the runway laterally
options.c: The aircraft will struggle with takeoff due to an incorrectly low VR (rotation speed)
options.d: The aircraft will require less runway distance for take-off due to incorrect speed settings
